scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w @profit-analyzer/core" "npm run dev -w @profit-analyzer/api" "npm run dev -w @profit-analyzer/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @profit-analyzer/core && npm run build -w @profit-analyzer/api && npm run build -w @profit-analyzer/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @profit-analyzer/core && npm run test -w @profit-analyzer/api && npm run test -w @profit-analyzer/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @profit-analyzer/core && npm run lint -w @profit-analyzer/api && npm run lint -w @profit-analyzer/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @profit-analyzer/core && npm run typecheck -w @profit-analyzer/api && npm run typecheck -w @profit-analyzer/web
